name: Esp32 Ble Tracker → On Ble Advertise
description: An automation to perform when a Bluetooth advertising is received. See [`on_ble_advertise` Trigger](https://esphome.io/components/esp32_ble_tracker#esp32_ble_tracker-on_ble_advertise).
